_publications._publicationTitle: Optical dopamine monitoring with dLight1 reveals mesolimbic phenotypes in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Average VTA dopaminergic soma area (left; n+/+ = 17, n+/- = 15; unpaired t-test; t30 = 4.65, p<0.001)
details: Nf1+/- VTA dopaminergic neurons had smaller cross-sectional area (t30 = 4.65, p<0.001) compared to Nf1+/+ neurons
